query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Live updates: ASX to rise after Wall Street tech rally as oil prices drop again
articles.description: Oil prices have dropped again as investors hope for peace in the Middle East and an end to the global energy shock. Follow the day's events and insights as they happen with our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.

articles.title: Live updates: KPMG boss resigns over mishandled whistleblower allegations, ASX climbs
articles.description: Auction clearance rates have fallen to levels not seen since the 2022 housing downturn. The ASX is up solidly as oil prices drop on hopes of a Middle East peace deal. Follow live.

articles.title: Southwest Airlines CEO says fare increases are here to stay
articles.description: Southwest Airlines CEO Bob Jordan indicated Thursday that fare increases over the past few months amid the Iran War conflict could stay once oil prices fall.

articles.title: Key inflation gauge worsens as Americans’ spending power erodes
articles.description: A key inflation gauge accelerated in April to the highest level in three years, the latest sign that spiking gas prices and higher food costs are squeezing Americans’ finances.

articles.title: Iran, Gas Prices, the Ballroom: Trump Professes Indifference Over Fallout
articles.description: President Trump has increasingly adopted a posture of nonchalance when pushed on the political consequences of his actions.

articles.title: Consumer sentiment, confidence index May 2026: Sentiment is at its lowest since 1952, gas prices still high
articles.description: United States consumers feel worse about their politics now than they did during the COVID-19 pandemic, Great Recession or 1970s oil crisis.

articles.title: Outlook for oil remains extremely vulnerable to geopolitical risks: Reliance Industries Ltd
articles.description: Global oil demand growth is expected to be sluggish due to higher oil prices and economic slowdown in FY 2026‑27 amid West Asia conflict, RIL said in its annual report. Crude oil has been highly volatile since March this year when the US-Israel conflict started.

articles.title: Oil prices settle in mixed direction on conflicting reports of US-Iran ceasefire deal
articles.description: GLOBAL-OIL:Oil prices settle in mixed direction on conflicting reports of US-Iran ceasefire deal

articles.title: Oil Market Swings Amid U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Developments
articles.description: Oil prices experienced volatility following mixed signals about extending the U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Brent crude futures saw marginal declines while U.S. oil futures slightly increased. Despite a potential agreement to prolong the ceasefire, official confirmation is pending. The complex market environment remains sensitive to Middle East developments and stockpile changes.

articles.title: Cracker Barrel set to give away free gas and food to lure customers back
articles.description: The sweepstakes comes as Americans struggle with soaring gas prices and high grocery bills
